---
title: "Résumé"
---

You can download the PDF version of my résumé [here](resume/Resume.pdf){.btn-cta}.

# Professional Summary

Data-driven marketing analytics professional and entrepreneurial leader with 8+ years of experience translating complex data into actionable business insights. Proven ability to design and deploy marketing measurement frameworks, automate reporting pipelines, and implement AI-powered systems that drive measurable client acquisition growth. Experienced managing cross-functional stakeholders, vendor relationships, and multi-client analytics engagements across healthcare, legal, apparel, and event industries.

# Core Competencies

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
- Marketing Analytics & Measurement Strategy
- SQL & Data Extraction / Querying
- Python · Google Analytics (GA4) · Meta Ads Manager
- Data Visualization & BI Reporting
- AI Agent Deployment & Funnel Automation
- CRM Management (Salesforce, HubSpot)
:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
- Cross-Functional Stakeholder Management
- Budget Planning & Financial Oversight
- Vendor & Agency Management
- Project Management & Process Improvement
- Advanced Excel / Google Sheets
- Strategic Communications & Presentations
:::
:::

# Education

| Degree | Institution | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| B.S., Business Administration (Marketing) | California State Polytechnic University, Pomona | Former NCAA Track & Field Athlete (Decathlon) |

# Professional Experience

### Marketing Analytics Consultant | AI Implementation Specialist
**Independent Marketing & Analytics Contractor** · 2024 – Present

- Deliver ongoing marketing analytics consulting to 6+ clients on retainer, including law firms, professional services companies, and consumer brands, designing measurement strategies and reporting frameworks aligned to business goals
- Architect and deploy AI-powered client acquisition agents and automated marketing funnels within law firm practices, directly increasing lead volume and reducing manual intake overhead
- Design and implement end-to-end marketing analytics for Shopify e-commerce platforms, including conversion tracking, funnel performance dashboards, and campaign attribution reporting
- Extract, clean, and analyze marketing data across Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, and CRM platforms (Salesforce, HubSpot) to produce stakeholder-ready insights and actionable recommendations
- Build automated reporting solutions and data pipelines using SQL, Python, and advanced Excel/Sheets, reducing manual reporting time and improving data accuracy
- Translate complex multi-channel campaign data into executive-level presentations and dashboards, enabling data-informed budget allocation decisions
- Manage vendor and agency relationships, ensuring data consistency, quality, and alignment across all reporting deliverables

---

### Co-Founder / President / Board Member
**Prevent Medical Solutions** · 2022 – Present

- Co-founded and scaled an EMS company from startup to 580+ employees and a $15M valuation, driving all strategic data, financial analytics, and operational reporting
- Designed and maintained financial planning models, budget forecasts, and KPI dashboards used by the board and executive team to guide strategic decisions
- Negotiated and managed contracts with event organizations and vendor partners, leveraging data analysis to evaluate ROI and performance outcomes
- Built workforce analytics and hiring pipeline reporting systems supporting rapid headcount scaling and multi-site operational deployments

---

### Site Operations Manager / EMT-B
**Emergency 1 Response** · 2021 – 2022

- Managed logistics, staffing, and operational data for temporary medical facilities at large-scale live events
- Led cross-functional teams and coordinated multi-vendor resources under high-pressure timelines

---

### Site Operations Liaison
**Insomniac Events** · 2021

- Coordinated operational readiness and logistics for dispatch centers and temporary hospitals servicing 600+ patients daily across major live events

# Technical Skills

- **Analytics & Data:** SQL, Python, Advanced Excel & Google Sheets, Google Analytics (GA4), Meta Ads Manager
- **CRM & Marketing Platforms:** Salesforce, HubSpot, Shopify (analytics & reporting)
- **AI & Automation:** AI agent deployment, marketing funnel automation, workflow automation tools
- **Reporting & BI:** Dashboard design, data visualization, executive reporting, campaign attribution modeling
